title: Adam Lilith question
wikitext:
[]: Adam/Lilith question             Quote Post by chacamacaman » Thu Jan 19, 2012 8:37 am Hi everyone, I'm a big Evangelion fan but I've been having a few questions in my head for some time about the series. The way for the Angels to start the Third Impact is to break into Terminal Dogma and fuse with Adam (I think), but it turned out in episode 24 that it was actually Lilith who they kept there. Seele probably knew about this, but people like Misato and Ritsuko didn't (i think). But why did they make everyone believe it was Adam who was kept there, instead of just saying it was Lilith? and why did the Angels always go straight to Terminal Dogma, did they maybe feel there was an Angel down there? but couldn't they have felt that the body of Adam was somewhere there too then? I really hope you guys can answer my questions. I really love Evangelion, it's just these few questions i've been having (but which NGE viewer doesn't have them :) )

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 19, 2012 2:42 pm Strangely enough, there aren't any obvious topics to point at for this one. The closest from a quick search are: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/1914/Angels-and-their-oh-so-mysterious-objectives/0/ http://forum.evageeks.org/post/440860/Angels-making-contact-with-Adam/?#440860

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 20, 2012 12:04 pm Eva2's Classified Information tells us the following: Adam-based life took part in a contest of survival, putting the stakes on their own existence. Some of them were trying to access Lilith and reset all life, some of them had nothing in mind, and some were trying to recover their progenitor Adam. The Angels — Adam-based life — became active under their respective tactics for survival and success.

[]:             Quote Post by BulletShoot » Fri Jan 20, 2012 7:27 pm ^Doesn't that second quote contradict the fact the Misato didn't about Lilith until Kaji showed her.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jan 20, 2012 7:32 pm BulletShoot wrote: ^Doesn't that second quote contradict the fact the Misato didn't about Lilith until Kaji showed her.

The way for the Angels to start the Third Impact is to break into Terminal Dogma and fuse with Adam (I think), but it turned out in episode 24 that it was actually Lilith who they kept there. Seele probably knew about this, but people like Misato and Ritsuko didn't (i think). But why did they make everyone believe it was Adam who was kept there, instead of just saying it was Lilith? and why did the Angels always go straight to Terminal Dogma, did they maybe feel there was an Angel down there? but couldn't they have felt that the body of Adam was somewhere there too then? I really hope you guys can answer my questions. I really love Evangelion, it's just these few questions i've been having (but which NGE viewer doesn't have them :) )
